candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above EBIT, but not labelled as COGS/cost of revenues and appears outside the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of Revenues/COGS'), which is tied to external project costs. Not enough evidence that this belongs specifically to COGS.

Separate operating amortization line above EBIT, but not labelled as COGS/cost of revenues and appears outside the selected COGS bucket. More likely general operating overhead than cost of revenues-specific D&A.
Candidate label exists in the excerpt but no visible amounts and no indication it is a separate COGS-related operating row to add.
Candidate label exists in the excerpt but no visible amounts and no indication it is a separate COGS-related operating row to add.
Balancing row with no visible amounts; not an operating COGS-specific D&A row to add.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Cost of Revenues/COGS'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines but are not identified as cost-of-revenue/COGS D&A, so adding them to COGS would risk misclassification.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line above EBIT at the same level as the selected overhead component rows ('Staff expenses and remuneration', 'Other external costs', 'Share-based payment'). Since no SG&A subtotal was selected and D&A was excluded from the parent bucket, this should be added separately.

Explicit separate operating amortization line above EBIT at the same level as the selected overhead component rows. It appears outside the selected XSGA component bucket and should be added separately.
More granular amortization-related label, but no visible amounts and likely subordinate to the broader 'Amortization' line. Do not choose when the broader line exists.
More granular amortization-related label, but no visible amounts and likely subordinate to the broader 'Amortization' line. Do not choose when the broader line exists.
Balancing row with no visible amounts; not preferable versus the explicit operating 'Depreciation' and 'Amortization' rows.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA reference bucket consists of overhead component rows only and explicitly excluded D&A in the earlier mapping. The visible 'Depreciation' and 'Amortization' rows are separate operating lines above EBIT, so they should be added separately. No separate R&D expense row is visible, and no explicit 'Amortization in R&D' row exists.
